data.name: common.internal_error
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: common.unauthorized
data.value: Your current session has expired. Please log in again to continue.

data.name: common.forbidden
data.value: You do not have the necessary permission to access this resource.

data.name: common.insufficient_permissions
data.value: Your account role does not permit this action.

data.name: common.validation_failed
data.value: We couldn't process your request because some required information is missing or invalid.

data.name: common.already_exists
data.value: This entry already exists. Please choose a different value.

data.name: common.does_not_exist
data.value: The item you are trying to modify does not exist.

data.name: common.not_found
data.value: We couldn't find the {0}.

data.name: common.conflict
data.value: Conflict: {0}.

data.name: common.idempotency_conflict
data.value: This idempotency key was already used for a different request. Use a fresh key or replay the original request unchanged.

data.name: field.required
data.value: {0} is required.

data.name: field.invalid
data.value: {0} is invalid.

data.name: field.invalid_length
data.value: {0} must be between {1} and {2} characters.

data.name: field.invalid_format
data.value: {0} format is invalid.

data.name: field.must_be_greater_than
data.value: {0} must be greater than {1}.

data.name: user.account_exists_with_different_provider
data.value: An account with this email already exists using a different sign-in provider.

data.name: user.email_already_registered
data.value: This email is already registered.

data.name: user.date_of_birth_in_future
data.value: Date of birth cannot be in the future.

data.name: user.age_out_of_range
data.value: Age must be between {0} and {1} years.

data.name: auth.invalid_credentials
data.value: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.

data.name: auth.account_locked
data.value: Your account has been temporarily locked due to too many failed sign-in attempts. Please try again later.

data.name: auth.invalid_refresh_token
data.value: The refresh token is invalid or has expired. Please log in again.

data.name: auth.already_verified
data.value: This account is already verified.

data.name: auth.verification_not_found
data.value: Verification code was not found. Please request a new one.

data.name: auth.verification_code_incorrect
data.value: The verification code is incorrect. Please try again.

data.name: auth.verification_code_expired
data.value: The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.

data.name: auth.password_reset_not_found
data.value: Password reset request was not found. Please request a new one.

data.name: auth.password_reset_expired
data.value: The password reset link has expired. Please request a new one.

data.name: auth.email_send_failed
data.value: Failed to send email: {0}.
